math_recheck: Re-derived and verified (sympy + numpy): S(S+1)-(S-n)(S-n+1)=n(2S-(n-1)) fixing S^+=sqrt(2S-n_hat)a; [S^z,S^+]=S^+ and [S^+,S^-]=(n+1)(2S-n)-n(2S-n+1)=2(S-n)=2S^z; H_1=JS(adi-adj)(ai-aj), ground state -NqJS^2/2, H_2 magnon-magnon term, Fourier eps_k=qJS(1-gamma_k), 1D 2JS(1-cos ka)~JS(ka)^2; AFM Bogoliubov u_k^2,v_k^2 and condition gamma_k(u^2+v^2)+2uv=0 giving 2JS|sin ka| all match Utermohlen; code runs clean (machine-precision algebra, linear map exact at top, O(1) error at bottom). High-field chi ~ H^{-1/2} confirmed against the primary paper's published abstract (ADS/SciRP).
fixes: context.md:49,66-72 — removed oscillator_matrices (boson ladder) primitive from the Code-framework scaffold: pre-giving the bosonic ladder leaked the central move (re-express spins in boson operators); replaced with generic msqrt PSD helper so the scaffold is pre-method-pure and the boson construction now lives only in the method's filled slot, preserving piece-for-piece correspondence with the final hp_exact/hp_linear code
